name: InterfaceStatus
title: InterfaceStatus
syntax: void InterfaceStatus(long time, long channel, long status);
description: The callback can be inserted in the sections callback function or function.

The callback occurs when the status of the connection to the interface hardware is changed (e.g. when Windows reports a lost connection to a CAN/WLAN gateway or to a WLAN interface hardware for Car2x communication).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status of the channel Values:3015: The connection is lost

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
